ESOptimizeContext Struct Reference

Class designed to encapsulate all the information needed by the GSL optimization function. More...

#include <es_optimize_context.h>

List of all members.

Public Member Functions

 ESOptimizeContext (ExtremalSurface *_s, Vector3 _p, Vector3 _v)
 Constructor.
float extremum ()
 Increments the value of a parameter t from 0, until the energy associated to p + v*t stops to decay, and return this value of t.
bool is_near_minimun ()
 Returns true if the energy at the point p is smaller than the energy in the neighborhood.

Public Attributes

const Vector3 & p
 Position in the space.
const Vector3 & v
 Direction in the space.
ExtremalSurface * s
 Pointer that allows the GSL library to access member functions of surfaces.

Detailed Description

Class designed to encapsulate all the information needed by the GSL optimization function.

Constructor & Destructor Documentation

ESOptimizeContext::ESOptimizeContext ( ExtremalSurface *  _s,
Vector3  _p,
Vector3  _v 
) [inline]

Constructor.

Member Function Documentation

float ESOptimizeContext::extremum (  ) 

Increments the value of a parameter t from 0, until the energy associated to p + v*t stops to decay, and return this value of t.

bool ESOptimizeContext::is_near_minimun (  ) 

Returns true if the energy at the point p is smaller than the energy in the neighborhood.

This function is important to detect the case where the function extremum() does not work well.

Member Data Documentation

const Vector3& ESOptimizeContext::p

Position in the space.

const Vector3& ESOptimizeContext::v

Direction in the space.

ExtremalSurface* ESOptimizeContext::s

Pointer that allows the GSL library to access member functions of surfaces.
